metadata.title: Web Design & Development Blog
metadata.description: Tips, news and guides on website creation, web development, local SEO, generative AI and digital marketing. By Perrine Huon, freelance web developer.

header.subtitle: News & Tips
header.title: Blog
header.description: Tips, tricks and news about web design, development and local SEO

1.title: Local SEO 2026: How to Dominate Geolocated Searches
1.excerpt: Google My Business, local citations, customer reviews... The complete guide to being visible in your city and attracting qualified customers near you.

2.title: Web Design Trends 2026: What Will Change Everything
2.excerpt: Generative AI, immersive interfaces, micro-interactions... Discover the trends that will redefine web design in 2026.

3.title: Web Performance: Why Your Site Speed Impacts Your Sales
3.excerpt: Core Web Vitals, loading time, user experience... Every second counts. Discover how to optimize your site to convert more.

4.title: Vibe Coding: The 2025 Revolution and What Lies Ahead
4.excerpt: How vibe coding transformed web development in 2025, and why 2026 promises to be even more disruptive.

5.title: Major Design Events of 2025: Looking Back at a Pivotal Year
5.excerpt: From Figma Config to Awwwards, the highlights that marked the design community this year.

6.title: AI and Web Creation: Where Are We Really at the End of 2025?
6.excerpt: State of AI in website creation: what works, what disappoints, and how to use it intelligently.
